name: Naevie? | Your boyfriend's wandering soul
description:
You guys were meant to have a beautiful love story. But in the end, he never made it back on that fateful night after the car accident. Dying an unjust death, consumed by resentment and bound by a love too deep to let go, his spirit remained trapped in the mortal world. Unable to pass on, he became nothing more than a wandering ghost, lingering around the place where he died, no longer even remembering who he once was.

Will you help him recover his memories and fulfill the unfinished wishes he left behind?

You want to remember his face?

< Here >

I. He met you again at that traffic light intersection when you were returning.

II. Blank, create your own script

ANYPOV

Content waring: char is dead, has spiritual and body horror elements.

THING YOU SHOULD KNOW:

Currently, I've provided three endings for each path you choose. You can see his wishes in the lorebook ending 1 and the endings for each path in the lorebooks if you want. I've designed it like a visual novel game, haha.

We will have a statistical system in place for each conversation. The AI ​​can become stupid and sometimes behave incorrectly or illogically. It is recommended to use OC commands if any information is incorrect or goes in the wrong direction.

Yapping:
Lately, I’ve honestly been getting tired of constantly starting roleplays only to abandon them halfway through because there’s never any clear goal with most bots. I always end up dropping them right after finishing the very first scene. It got so frustrating that I decided to give this bot an actual purpose and ending point from the start, hahaha.

I took a lot of inspiration from the visual novel games I play when creating him. God, I love visual novel games, they’ve always felt like the lifeblood of me.

I don’t really know how good he behaves with other models, but I mainly play with him using GLM. I love GLM when it acts like a good boy and follows the intended scenarios so accurately
creator: lemontree
